mapper.select:
/* 1. 기본 뼈대: 게시글(a)과 댓글(c)을 연결(JOIN)해서 가져옵니다 */ SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.writer, a.created_at as createdAt, a.updated_at as updatedAt FROM article a LEFT JOIN comment c ON a.id = c.article_id WHERE 1=1
/* 2. keyword(검색어)가 비어있지 않을 때만 아래 검색 조건을 실행합니다 */
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND a.writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.id DESC
SELECT id, title, content, writer, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM article WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, content, writer, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO comment (article_id, writer, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{writer}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, writer, content, created_at as createdAt FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY id DESC
